dashboard.title: Welcome to MindEase
dashboard.subtitle: Your cognitive support companion
dashboard.body: MindEase is designed to help you manage tasks, maintain focus, and optimize your cognitive performance. Use the sidebar to navigate between different features and customize your experience.
dashboard.quickActionsBody: Start your day by reviewing your task list, setting up a focus session, or adjusting your cognitive settings to match your current needs.

tasks.title: Tasks
tasks.body: Mock tasks list goes here. You will be able to create, prioritize, and track your tasks with cognitive-friendly layouts.

focus.title: Focus Mode
focus.body: Mock focus session setup. You will configure timers, ambient sounds, and focus settings tailored to your needs.

cognitive.title: Cognitive Settings
cognitive.body: Mock settings panel. You will adjust cognitive intensity, notifications, and accessibility preferences here.

settings.title: Settings
settings.body: Mock settings screen. You will manage account preferences, notifications, and integrations here.

login.title: Welcome back
login.subtitle: Sign in to continue to MindEase
login.helper: Your session will be saved on this device.
login.switchToRegister: Don't have an account? Sign up

errors.missingFields: Please enter your email and password.

register.title: Create account
register.subtitle: Join MindEase to get started
register.helper: Your account will be created and you'll be logged in automatically.
register.switchToLogin: Already have an account? Sign in

errors.passwordTooShort: Password must be at least 6 characters.
errors.invalidEmail: Please enter a valid email address.

errors.passwordFieldsRequired: Please fill in all password fields.
errors.passwordTooShort: Password must be at least 6 characters.
errors.updateFailed: Failed to update profile. Please try again.
errors.changeFailed: Failed to change password. Please try again.
